subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Protector! Exalted and glorified art Thou above my praise and the praise of all, by the majesty of Thy Divinity and the grandeur of Thy Lordship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و مجیری تعالیت و تجللت لعزه الوهیتک و عظمه ربوبیتک عن ثناای و ثناء کل
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for spiritual recognition
